kpis.name: Milestone charter committed
kpis.target: Program plan doc exists and references milestone/KPI model

kpis.name: Machine-readable tracker active
kpis.target: Plan and work-item files validate

kpis.name: CI gate enforced
kpis.target: program-check wired into make ci

kpis.name: Legal source growth
kpis.target: >= 50 sources with explicit license + attribution metadata
kpis.measure: acquisition index count and metadata completeness

kpis.name: Review gate quality
kpis.target: >= 95% review pass rate

kpis.name: Policy compliance
kpis.target: 0 sources with disallowed licensing

kpis.name: Deterministic conversion
kpis.target: >= 30 new FDML outputs regenerated deterministically

kpis.name: Strict validity
kpis.target: >= 90% doctor --strict pass on generated set

kpis.name: Traceability
kpis.target: 100% generated files have provenance sidecar

kpis.name: Enriched dance coverage
kpis.target: >= 15 files enriched with timing + topology semantics

kpis.name: Issue-rate reduction
kpis.target: Week-over-week reduction in semantic issues

kpis.name: Spec alignment
kpis.target: All added semantics documented in specs
kpis.measure: spec/doc references for each issue code

kpis.name: Deterministic build green
kpis.target: make ci && mvn test pass consistently

kpis.name: End-to-end demo flow
kpis.target: init -> doctor --strict -> render/search shown with reproducible commands

kpis.name: Evaluation package
kpis.target: Coverage + findings + limitations documented

kpis.name: Corpus breadth increase
kpis.target: Increase curated licensed sources from baseline 65 to at least 90 (+25) with at least 5 new sources each across Africa, Middle East plus Caucasus, South plus Southeast Asia, Europe regional, and Americas plus Oceania; preserve deterministic ingestion evidence
kpis.measure: acquisition and ingest reports in out/

kpis.name: Semantic quality retention
kpis.target: Maintain strict validation and semantic gate quality while expanding coverage
kpis.measure: make ci and semantic gate outputs

kpis.name: Demo-visible diversity
kpis.target: Ensure new dance categories are represented in site cards and searchable metadata

kpis.name: Description coverage lift
kpis.target: Increase full-description coverage in expanded generated corpus from baseline 1/90 (1.11%) to at least 30/90 (33.3%) using deterministic extraction and normalization

kpis.name: Quality retention on upgraded files
kpis.target: Keep at least 95% doctor --strict pass on files classified as full-description and ensure zero placeholder-only upgraded files
kpis.measure: doctor strict reports plus placeholder audit report

kpis.name: Demo-visible description depth
kpis.target: Expose full-description facets in site search and demo links so upgraded dance descriptions are discoverable

kpis.name: Submission package completeness
kpis.target: Align submission docs and artifact references with final M6 outcomes and reproducible commands

kpis.name: Final reproducibility rehearsal
kpis.target: Run clean end-to-end rehearsal and capture deterministic report artifacts for final handoff

kpis.name: Defense narrative readiness
kpis.target: Produce concise defense brief covering problem, method, results, limitations, and future work

kpis.name: Geometry baseline coverage map
kpis.target: Produce deterministic full-corpus baseline for geometry-readiness with per-file blocker reasons

kpis.name: Constraint-ready depth uplift
kpis.target: Upgrade strict full-description files to v1.2 geometry-ready structures with no regressions in strict doctor quality

kpis.name: Pipeline-level geometry governance
kpis.target: Add repeatable gates and documentation proving geometry/logical constraints are enforced across converted corpus workflows
kpis.measure: Makefile gates and docs/USAGE.md geometry workflow

kpis.name: Full-corpus geometry-ready outputs
kpis.target: Produce deterministic promoted corpus with geometry-ready v1.2 outputs for the full converted set and zero unresolved baseline blockers in promoted outputs

kpis.name: Strict description depth completion
kpis.target: Increase strict full-description coverage from 67/90 to at least 85/90 while preserving full-description quality gate thresholds

kpis.name: Pipeline adoption and demo integration
kpis.target: Adopt promoted v1.2 corpus as the default demo/search/CI path with governance checks and reproducible workflow docs
kpis.measure: Makefile ci and docs/USAGE.md plus docs/DEMO.html references

kpis.name: Corpus-wide discovery completeness
kpis.target: Process 100% of promoted corpus files through multi-pass discovery with per-file checklist resolution

kpis.name: Evidence-linked ontology and rule candidates
kpis.target: All promoted parameter and validator candidates include file reference, evidence span, and confidence in machine-readable outputs

kpis.name: Saturation and governance stop conditions
kpis.target: Stop discovery only after growth ratio stays below 1% for two consecutive full-corpus passes with unresolved checklist files reduced to zero

kpis.name: Promote discovery candidates into unified FDML contract
kpis.target: Promote accepted ontology candidates into a single extensible FDML meta-structure and document contract decisions with reversal conditions

kpis.name: Unify validator coverage across full corpus
kpis.target: Run one validator stack across all promoted corpus files using promoted rule set and publish per-rule support/failure metrics

kpis.name: Single-pipeline adoption and governance
kpis.target: Adopt unified FDML + validator workflow as default CI/demo path with deterministic gates and no subset-specific execution branches

milestones.title: Semantic Depth and Rule Breadth Productization

kpis.name: Rubric and depth governance gate
kpis.target: Define explicit folk-dance semantic rubric and enforce depth/rule thresholds with deterministic gate outputs

kpis.name: Corpus-wide semantic dimension uplift
kpis.target: Raise low-coverage rubric dimensions across the full corpus so per-dimension and per-file richness thresholds pass

kpis.name: Validator and contract depth expansion
kpis.target: Increase promoted ontology fields and recognized validator rules to meet rubric rule-depth thresholds under unified pipeline checks

milestones.title: Full-Vision Unified FDML and Validator Exhaustiveness

kpis.name: Single-structure FDML expansion from full-corpus evidence
kpis.target: Run deterministic extraction over 100% promoted files and publish an evidence-linked parameter registry so one general FDML structure captures discovered dance-description dimensions without subset branching

kpis.name: Unified validator coverage with explicit failure semantics
kpis.target: Run one validator stack over the same 100% corpus and publish per-rule applicability plus failure taxonomy with zero hidden auto-pass behavior

kpis.name: Anti-drift governance for full-product pipeline
kpis.target: Enforce intake to discovery to contract to validation workflow with saturation stop conditions, decision registry, assumption registry, and risk ledger under deterministic gates

milestones.title: Backlog Burn-Down for Full-Product Folk-Dance Coverage

kpis.name: P0/P1 contract gap remediation across full corpus
kpis.target: Reduce expressive expansion files from 69 toward <=20 by filling highest-priority movement and formation fields in one unified FDML structure

kpis.name: Unified validator failure burn-down
kpis.target: Reduce expanded validator failures from 498 by at least 70% while preserving one-stack applicability over 100% of promoted corpus files

kpis.name: Context specificity normalization and governance tightening
kpis.target: Replace placeholder origin metadata with evidence-linked values for >=90% of files and tighten governance thresholds for context gaps

kpis.name: Corpus-wide exhaustive descriptor extraction
kpis.target: Run iterative full-corpus discovery to extract high-coverage descriptor dimensions into one evidence-linked FDML contract candidate ledger with saturation tracking

kpis.name: Expanded validator coverage for geometry/logical/physical constraints
kpis.target: Generate and enforce expanded validator rules from discovered dimensions with explicit applicability and failure taxonomy over 100% of corpus files

kpis.name: Single-pipeline governance and product-grade evidence
kpis.target: Adopt M15 extraction-to-contract-to-validation workflow in CI/demo with no subset branching and publish governance plus coverage summary outputs

milestones.title: Contract and Validator Deepening for Exhaustive Folk-Dance Coverage

kpis.name: Promote richer FDML contract dimensions from M15 evidence
kpis.target: Promote additional ontology dimensions from M15 evidence into the unified FDML contract with explicit decision registry and schema/spec alignment

kpis.name: Broaden unified validator families for exhaustive dance constraints
kpis.target: Expand one-stack validator coverage for movement, geometry, relational, timing, and higher-order constraints over 100% of corpus with measurable failure taxonomy and burn-down

kpis.name: Adopt M16 single-pipeline governance in CI and evidence docs
kpis.target: Wire M16 extraction-to-contract-to-validation governance into CI and publish machine-readable anti-drift evidence and closeout narrative

milestones.title: Style, Cultural, and Biomechanical Coverage Expansion

kpis.name: Expand style and cultural descriptor depth in unified FDML structure
kpis.target: Extract and normalize deeper style, performance, and cultural-context descriptor families across 100% corpus files under one FDML structure with explicit evidence coverage metrics

kpis.name: Expand unified validators with biomechanical and higher-order constraints
kpis.target: Add one-stack validators for physical plausibility, transition coherence, and performance realism with measurable applicability and baseline-current failure burn-down across full corpus

kpis.name: Adopt M17 governance and CI anti-drift controls
kpis.target: Enforce M17 descriptor-to-validator workflow in CI with deterministic governance checks and decision/assumption/risk ledgers

kpis.name: Resolve remaining biomechanical realism failures under one validator stack
kpis.target: Reduce remaining M17 realism backlog from 26 files toward zero by uplifting turn-axis and transition-coherence semantics while preserving one-stack applicability and burn-down thresholds

kpis.name: Raise cultural/context depth coverage toward full-corpus completeness
kpis.target: Increase files with cultural descriptor depth from 69/90 to at least 85/90 with deterministic evidence-linked descriptor normalization over one corpus path

kpis.name: Adopt M18 governance and CI anti-drift controls
kpis.target: Enforce descriptor-to-validator-to-burndown invariants for M18 in CI with deterministic governance output and closeout-ready decision/assumption/risk ledgers

kpis.name: Scale corpus breadth and descriptor depth under one FDML structure
kpis.target: Expand deterministic corpus coverage beyond the current 90-file baseline with region-balanced growth while preserving full-description depth and evidence-linked cultural/style fields across 100% of active corpus files

kpis.name: Harden one-stack validators for expanded corpus realism
kpis.target: Expand unified validator families for movement geometry, sequencing, biomechanical realism, and cultural-context consistency with explicit applicability metrics and measurable baseline-current burn-down over full active corpus

kpis.name: Adopt M19 end-to-end governance and release checks
kpis.target: Enforce one-pipeline intake-to-validation governance in CI with machine-readable decision/assumption/risk ledgers and release-grade reproducibility checks

milestones.title: Global Coverage Scale and Evidence-Grounded Semantics

kpis.name: Expand corpus scale with regional-balance backlog reduction
kpis.target: Increase deterministic active corpus beyond 90 files while reducing M19 underrepresented bucket gaps through evidence-linked intake and conversion under one FDML structure

kpis.name: Deepen descriptor and validator realism from source-grounded evidence
kpis.target: Reduce reliance on marker-style descriptor defaults and expand unified validator realism checks with explicit baseline-current burn-down and applicability guarantees across full active corpus

kpis.name: Adopt M20 governance and release hardening in CI
kpis.target: Enforce M20 intake-to-descriptor-to-validator governance invariants in CI with machine-readable decision/assumption/risk ledgers and updated release evidence references

milestones.title: Descriptor Completion and Constraint-Rich Validation at 109-File Scale

kpis.name: Close descriptor depth gaps across full active corpus
kpis.target: Increase style, cultural, and combined descriptor depth coverage on the 109-file active corpus while reducing low-support descriptor families through deterministic source-grounded extraction

kpis.name: Expand source-grounded validator families for context and structure
kpis.target: Grow the dedicated source-grounded validator layer beyond the current 8-rule set to include context and structure constraints with explicit applicability and baseline-current burn-down

kpis.name: Adopt M21 governance and release synchronization
kpis.target: Enforce M21 single-pipeline governance in CI with machine-readable decision, assumption, and risk ledgers plus synchronized program and submission evidence references

milestones.title: Descriptor Exhaustiveness and Validator Realism Hardening at 109-File Scale

kpis.name: Raise low-support descriptor families with source-grounded evidence
kpis.target: Increase support ratios for low-coverage style/performance/culture descriptor families across the 109-file active corpus while preserving strict doctor and geometry quality gates

kpis.name: Burn down context/structure validator failure taxonomy
kpis.target: Reduce M21 context and structure failure backlog through deeper descriptor-validator coherence checks with measurable baseline-current reduction and full-rule applicability

kpis.name: Adopt M22 governance and release synchronization
kpis.target: Enforce M22 descriptor-to-validator governance invariants in CI with machine-readable decision/assumption/risk ledgers and synchronized program plus submission evidence references

milestones.title: Residual Taxonomy Closure and Descriptor Support Consolidation at 109-File Scale

kpis.name: Consolidate residual low-support descriptor families
kpis.target: Raise remaining low-support descriptor support with deterministic source-grounded extraction so support improvements are broad and not concentrated in a small subset of files

kpis.name: Close residual context and structure validator taxonomy backlog
kpis.target: Reduce remaining M22 validator failures and failure-file spread through deeper descriptor-validator alignment and coherence checks while preserving full-rule applicability and mapping integrity

kpis.name: Adopt M23 governance and release synchronization
kpis.target: Enforce M23 descriptor-to-validator governance invariants in CI with machine-readable decision/assumption/risk ledgers and synchronized program plus submission evidence references

milestones.title: Residual Failure Zeroing and Production-Grade Transition at 109-File Scale

kpis.name: Eliminate residual validator taxonomy failures
kpis.target: Reduce the remaining M23 context and structure failure backlog to zero with deterministic source-grounded descriptor and validator closure while preserving full-rule applicability and candidate mapping integrity

kpis.name: Saturate residual cultural-context descriptor depth
kpis.target: Raise residual weak-support cultural-context descriptors on the remaining failure files to source-grounded saturation under one FDML structure without strict quality regression

kpis.name: Adopt M24 governance and activate final productization queue
kpis.target: Enforce M24 descriptor-to-validator governance invariants in CI with machine-readable decision/assumption/risk ledgers and activate the final full-product pipeline queue from a clean closeout state

kpis.name: Publish final product-readiness baseline and gap ledger
kpis.target: Produce a deterministic project-level baseline that summarizes architecture, quality, and reproducibility state across the unified 109-file FDML pipeline with explicit gap inventory

kpis.name: Close high-impact architecture, testing, and documentation gaps
kpis.target: Implement measurable hardening work so the single-pipeline FDML system is cleaner to maintain, better validated, and submission-ready without toy-path regressions
kpis.measure: make ci plus docs/SUBMISSION.md and docs/COVERAGE.md updates

kpis.name: Adopt final release governance and close project queue
kpis.target: Enforce final anti-drift governance invariants and transition from active execution into documented release-ready closeout with auditable evidence

kpis.name: Establish post-closeout polish baseline and backlog
kpis.target: Define a deterministic baseline for repository hygiene, documentation coherence, and release artifact integrity after M25 closeout, with explicit queued work and measurable acceptance checks

kpis.name: Implement production polish and consistency pass
kpis.target: Execute high-impact cleanup across repo structure, docs, and quality checks while preserving deterministic pipeline behavior and CI stability
kpis.measure: make ci plus docs/SUBMISSION.md and docs/COVERAGE.md plus targeted cleanup evidence

kpis.name: Adopt M26 governance and handoff packaging
kpis.target: Add final M26 governance guardrails and produce an auditable handoff package describing architecture, reproducibility commands, evidence artifacts, and residual risks
